title: Simple Manhunt Compass
description: Accurate Manhunt Compass that can be set-up with one command!
body:
Adds 2 commands that can be used to give (or stop giving) a manhunt compass which will track the player of your choice.

## Commands


**/track <player>** - Gives a manhunt compass, also gives a compass every time you die

**/untrack** - Stops giving you a compass when you die

## Usage


The compass always points to the player you are tracking the last time it updated, to update your compass right click it. The compass will not update if the targeted player is in another dimension.


### You can provide feedback or report bugs in my [website](https://mods.gustagamermtw.com/), all messages are anonymous.
